title: Spatial transcriptomics of a solid-tumour microenvironment

findings.executive_summary: Spatial transcriptomics in a colorectal-cancer cohort to characterise tumour-microenvironment structure. Clustering and cell-type deconvolution against a reference single-cell atlas.

embedding.source_text: Spatial transcriptomics of a solid-tumour microenvironment | Spatial transcriptomics in a colorectal-cancer cohort to characterise tumour-microenvironment structure. Clustering and cell-type deconvolution against a reference single-cell atlas. | Methods: clustering, cell-type deconvolution | Data: spatial transcriptomics | Disease: colorectal cancer | Tools: Seurat, SPOTlight, ggplot2
